goals.description: Goal! Qatar 0, Switzerland 1. Breel Embolo (Switzerland) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom left corner.
Own Goal by Miro Muheim, Switzerland. Qatar 1, Switzerland 1.
Goal! Brazil 0, Morocco 1. Ismael Saibari (Morocco) right footed shot from outside the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Brahim Díaz with a through ball following a fast break.
Goal! Brazil 1, Morocco 1. Vinícius Júnior (Brazil) right footed shot from the left side of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Bruno Guimarães.
Goal! Haiti 0, Scotland 1. John McGinn (Scotland) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the high centre of the goal.
Goal! Australia 1, Türkiye 0. Nestory Irankunda (Australia) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Paul Okon-Engstler.
Goal! Australia 2, Türkiye 0. Connor Metcalfe (Australia) left footed shot from outside the box to the bottom right corner.
Goal! Germany 1, Curaçao 0. Felix Nmecha (Germany) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Florian Wirtz.
Goal! Germany 1, Curaçao 1. Livano Comenencia (Curaçao) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner.
Goal! Germany 2, Curaçao 1. Nico Schlotterbeck (Germany) header from very close range to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Nathaniel Brown with a cross following a corner.
Goal! Germany 3, Curaçao 1. Kai Havertz (Germany) converts the penalty with a left footed shot to the bottom left corner.
Goal! Germany 4, Curaçao 1. Jamal Musiala (Germany) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Joshua Kimmich with a through ball.
Goal! Germany 5, Curaçao 1. Nathaniel Brown (Germany) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Deniz Undav.
Goal! Germany 6, Curaçao 1. Deniz Undav (Germany) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Joshua Kimmich.
Goal! Germany 7, Curaçao 1. Kai Havertz (Germany) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Deniz Undav with a through ball following a fast break.
Goal! Netherlands 1, Japan 0. Virgil van Dijk (Netherlands) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Ryan Gravenberch with a cross following a set piece situation.
Goal! Netherlands 1, Japan 1. Keito Nakamura (Japan) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Takefusa Kubo.
Goal! Netherlands 2, Japan 1. Crysencio Summerville (Netherlands) left footed shot from the right side of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Ryan Gravenberch.
Goal! Netherlands 2, Japan 2. Daichi Kamada (Japan) header from the centre of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Koki Ogawa following a corner.
Goal! Côte d'Ivoire 1, Ecuador 0. Amad Diallo (Côte d'Ivoire) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Wilfried Singo.
